chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD M.A. No.48 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.09.2024 Mr. Zaman Zeb Jatoi advocate for appellant. Mr. Ravi Kumar advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. After arguing at some length, both the parties consented that since the suit has been remanded to the trial court by the appellate court to decide afresh, therefore, trial court may frame additional issues in the suit and both the parties will file proposed issues before the trial court and the trial court thereafter proceed and decide the suit after affording an opportunity of hearing to the parties. This Miscellaneous Appeal is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. However, the trial court is directed to complete entire proceedings within a period of three months positively. JUDGE Ali Haider
